info.name: EmpowerHR Backend APIs
info.description: Import into Postman. Set `token` variable after login. Many routes use `/attendence`, `/payrole` (note spelling) and require `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`.

item.name: Get Saved Login by deviceId - GET /saved-logins/:deviceId
Clear Saved Login by deviceId - DELETE /saved-logins/:deviceId
